# Agustin Gonzalez Nicolini — Leadership & Engineering Coaching

> Agustin Gonzalez Nicolini is a VP of Engineering and leadership coach based in
> Berlin, Germany, with 15+ years of experience leading engineering teams across
> fintech, gaming, e-mobility, and healthtech. He coaches CTOs, VPs, engineering
> managers, and tech leads to scale teams, ship faster, and lead with confidence.

Website: https://agusgonzaleznic.com
Contact: info@agusgonzaleznic.com
Location: Berlin, Germany (coaching clients worldwide, remote)
Languages: English, Spanish, German
Book a session: https://calendar.app.google/kFaanhSae5WefLnD7

## Who he coaches

- CTOs and VPs of Engineering
- Engineering directors and managers
- Tech leads
- Individual contributors transitioning into leadership

## Coaching services

- **Executive Leadership Coaching (CTO & VP level)**: organization design and
  scaling, stakeholder and C-suite communication, technology roadmap alignment,
  board presentations, and executive presence. Format: bi-weekly 60-minute sessions.
- **Team & Manager Coaching (manager & director level)**: DORA metrics and
  deployment velocity, team rituals and retrospectives, hiring and performance
  frameworks, incident readiness and on-call culture, and DevOps/GitOps workflows
  with trunk-based development. Format: weekly or bi-weekly 45-minute sessions.
- **Career Transition Coaching (IC to leadership and beyond)**: IC to manager,
  manager to director, and director to VP transitions, plus career clarity and
  interview prep for leadership roles. Format: 8–12 week programs with weekly check-ins.

Every engagement starts with a complimentary 30-minute discovery call.

## Coaching philosophy

- **Growth through clarity**: clear goals, feedback loops, and OKRs that align
  individual growth with organizational success.
- **Empowerment through systems**: DevOps/GitOps workflows, DORA metrics, and
  decision frameworks that let teams move fast with autonomy.
- **Leadership through empathy**: psychological safety, intentional mentoring,
  and cultures where people thrive.

## Areas of expertise

Engineering leadership, executive coaching, team scaling, DevOps and GitOps,
DORA metrics, cloud-native architecture, FinOps and cloud cost optimization,
platform engineering, site reliability and incident management, organizational
design, and career transitions into leadership.

## Representative results

- 40% cloud cost reduction through FinOps best practices.
- 99.99% system uptime via DR/HA playbooks and multi-region failover.
- 3× faster releases with trunk-based DevOps, CI/CD, and GitOps.
- 75% reduced lead time after migrating to multi-account AWS.
- 50% team velocity boost through OKRs and DORA metrics.
- 60% faster onboarding with standardized processes and documentation.

## Experience

- 2022–2025 — VP of Engineering, JUCR GmbH (EV charging). Led migration to
  multi-account AWS across 5+ SaaS services; achieved 99.99% uptime.
- 2020–2022 — Cloud Security Manager, Wildlife Studios (gaming). Balanced rapid
  feature delivery with stringent security controls.
- 2018–2021 — DevOps Lead, Ualá (fintech). Core banking delivery, PCI-DSS
  compliance, and full serverless architecture.
- 2014–2018 — Infrastructure & Security Lead, Bdev (healthtech). Migrated
  on-premise to AWS; implemented SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance.
